[105:27]Negotiations were on ice now. There's a fifth round scheduled for tomorrow in Rome

[105:33]There was the killing of the diplomats last night, which is all they needed.

[105:41]And so we wound up today having a two-hour discussion talking about this crisis.

[105:46]And I have to say, this was maybe one of the better conversations we had.

[105:49]I think we were both really on the money and it was flowing good chemistry, so...

[105:55]Definitely an interview you don't want to miss if you didn't catch it make sure to catch the replay

[106:00]It's on my rumble channel. It's on his Twitter

[106:03]Which I retweeted it's on telegram, but I thought it was great. So, you know, it's funny how

[106:16]I'm more of a reactionary

[106:20]He's I suppose more like evangelical. I mean, he's from the South. I'm a Catholic

[106:28]But we wind up on the same page

[106:30]Because we are two people that we don't want chaos. We don't want violence. We want America to thrive

[107:24]And yet, you know, we don't know what to do.

[107:28]We all seem to be powerless in the face of this evil plan to drive us into a conflict.

[107:47]I mean, we can never forget that this happened and that this is happening.

[108:01]that they want us to die in their war,

[108:03]that they had a hand in 9-11, that they sank our ship, they killed our president.

[108:34]to social media and the debate over free speech,

[108:37]to debanking and the financial sanctions against people that speak out.

[108:41]the foreign money, which is just pure corruption and bribery in the electoral process.

[108:53]in the U.S. military being driven by a foreign nation and their emissaries in the United States.

[109:10]Necessarily need to prosecute every other issue, needs to be a single issue, which is we need sovereignty, we need independence.
